title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica Custom GUI Pack
description: Puella Magi Madoka Magica Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/JcmcAh0.png)** **This is a GUI Pack in the theme of "Puella Magi Madoka Magica". Really hope you enjoy really worked hard on this pack, pls give any feed back in the comments** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **menu image** **options menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/yqV8q0D.png)** **In game images** ****Anvil**** **![](https://i.imgur.com/mg2eyin.png)** ****Crafting** **Table**** ****![hJLK93G.png (1920×1080)](https://i.imgur.com/hJLK93G.png)**** ****Brewing Stand**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/iHL6lbr.png)**** ****Furnace**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/UP8YUgl.png)**** ****Beacon**** ![](https://i.imgur.com/nsanbWQ.png) **Shulker Box** **![](https://i.imgur.com/IeRNzXs.png)** **Villager Trading Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/rMi4dTa.png)** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
